query: SELECT id, paperId, LEFT(answersJson, 200) as answers_preview FROM testResults WHERE answersJson LIKE '%speaking%' OR answersJson LIKE '%.webm%' OR answersJson LIKE '%.mp4%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mWBJwMymT3uxJ8c.261d2007010d --database VUHjMbahokWnaDCesocaTj --execute SELECT id, paperId, LEFT(answersJson, 200) as answers_preview FROM testResults WHERE answersJson LIKE '%speaking%' OR answersJson LIKE '%.webm%' OR answersJson LIKE '%.mp4%' LIMIT 5;
